atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the `@tailwind` directive to insert Tailwind's `base`, `components`, `utilities` and `screens` styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Use the `@theme` directive to configure Tailwind's theme.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Use the `@source` directive to specify the files to scan for Tailwind utility classes.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Use the `@utility` directive to define custom utility classes in Tailwind CSS.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Use the `@custom-variant` directive to define custom variants in Tailwind CSS.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Use the `@plugin` directive to include official Tailwind CSS plugins.
